assertionsSummary.note: The course-map-fix milestone contains only fix-course-map which has no fulfills (empty array). No assertions from validation-contract.md are linked to this milestone. The VAL_* assertions belong to the pdf-extraction milestone.

observations.description: The fix-course-map feature updated course-map.json L8/L9/L10 titles to match actual PDF content, but does not fulfill any validation contract assertions
Scrutiny validation already passed for this milestone (npm run validate:content, npm run lint)
The VAL_* assertions in validation-contract.md relate to lectures.json content quality, which is the pdf-extraction milestone scope
observations.evidence: extract-l1-l2-full, extract-l3-l4-full, etc. have fulfills linking to VAL_* assertions

conclusion: course-map-fix milestone has no user-testable assertions. The feature only modified course-map.json metadata (titles/topics) without linking to any validation contract assertions. Scrutiny validation passed.
